message:
fix(test): use DefaultModels() for ollama test case consistently

The other agent type test cases were updated to use config.DefaultModels()
but the ollama case was still hardcoding "llama3". Align it with the
same pattern so the test stays correct if the default ever changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
